title: Squirrel Removal in Sheepshead Bay, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Sheepshead Bay, Brooklyn. Humane trapping, exclusion, and attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving 11235. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Sheepshead Bay residents face unique squirrel challenges due to the neighborhood's mix of vintage homes, brick apartment buildings, and waterfront properties near Emmons Avenue. Squirrels frequently infiltrate attics, soffits, and crawl spaces in the area's pre-war buildings and multi-family homes. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Sheepshead Bay, from the Marina to Manhattan Beach.
whyUs: Our technicians have over 15 years of experience handling squirrel infestations in Sheepshead Bay's diverse housing stock, from the co-ops along Ocean Avenue to the single-family homes near Kingsborough Community College. We offer same-day emergency service, humane removal methods, and permanent exclusion solutions backed by our written warranty.
localContext: Sheepshead Bay's tree-lined streets and proximity to the waterfront create ideal conditions for gray squirrels seeking shelter in residential structures. The neighborhood's older architecture, particularly buildings near the Sheepshead Bay High School area and along Jerome Avenue, often have gaps and deteriorated vents that allow easy squirrel entry.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Sheepshead Bay?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Sheepshead Bay typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. Single-entry cases start around $900, while complete attic restorations with multiple access points can reach $2,500. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a squirrel problem in Sheepshead Bay?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Sheepshead Bay and the 11235 zip code. Emergency situations involving squirrels trapped inside living spaces receive priority scheduling. Most initial inspections can be scheduled within 24 hours of your call.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Sheepshead Bay homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are very common in Sheepshead Bay due to the mature trees throughout the neighborhood and older building infrastructure. The area's brick apartment buildings and homes built in the 1920s-1950s often have deteriorated soffits, roof vents, and construction gaps that squirrels exploit to access attics and wall voids, especially during fall and early spring nesting seasons.

faqs.question: What does your squirrel removal service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes thorough property inspection, humane live trapping and removal, identification and sealing of all entry points, attic sanitization and insulation damage repair if needed, and preventative exclusion work. We use one-way exclusion doors when appropriate and provide warranties on our exclusion work to prevent future squirrel re-entry.
